skill.name: pexoai-agent
skill.description: Use this skill when the user wants to produce a short video (5–120 seconds). Supports any video type: product ads, TikTok/Instagram/YouTube content, brand videos, explainers, social clips. USE FOR: video production, AI video, make a video, product video, brand video, promotional clip, explainer video, short video.
skill.summary: AI video creation agent that handles scriptwriting, shot composition, transitions, and music for short-form videos.
skill.author: pexoai

security_audit.summary: Evaluated 534 static findings across 13 files. External command patterns are standard shell scripting for API operations. Network calls go only to pexo.ai. Hidden file access is for user config storage (~/.pexo/config). No credential exfiltration or malicious intent detected. Risk factors are expected for an API client skill.

high_findings.title: Shell Command Execution in Scripts
high_findings.description: Scripts use shell command substitution for API operations, file handling, and temp file creation. No user input injection vectors found - all arguments are hardcoded strings or controlled by the skill itself.

high_findings.title: Configuration File Access at ~/.pexo/
high_findings.description: Scripts read/write config from ~/.pexo/config for PEXO_API_KEY and PEXO_BASE_URL. Standard configuration storage pattern equivalent to .ssh/config.

medium_findings.title: Network Calls to External API
medium_findings.description: Skill makes network requests to pexo.ai API endpoints. All URLs are hardcoded to the legitimate Pexo service.

medium_findings.title: Environment Variable Access for API Key
medium_findings.description: Scripts read PEXO_API_KEY from environment or config file for authentication to Pexo service.

low_findings.title: Documentation Patterns Flagged as Commands
low_findings.description: Markdown files in references/ contain example shell commands using backticks. These are documentation, not executable code.

low_findings.title: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm Heuristics
low_findings.description: Static scanner flags weak crypto patterns, but no actual cryptographic operations found. Scanner appears to flag md5 strings in URLs.

low_findings.title: System Reconnaissance Patterns
low_findings.description: Diagnostic scripts check for installed tools (curl, jq, file) and network connectivity. Standard practice for CLI tools.

dangerous_patterns.title: Heuristic: Code Execution + Network + Credentials
dangerous_patterns.description: Static scanner flagged dangerous combination. Evaluated: skill executes shell commands to call Pexo API, which requires credentials. This is expected behavior for an API client skill.

content.user_title: Create professional AI videos in 5-120 seconds
content.value_statement: Need to produce video content but lack video production skills? Pexo AI Video Agent handles scriptwriting, shot composition, transitions, and music for short-form videos so you can focus on content strategy.
actual_capabilities: Create short-form videos (5-120 seconds) in multiple aspect ratios (16:9, 9:16, 1:1)
Upload and incorporate user-provided images, videos, and audio into productions
Handle end-to-end video production workflow including revisions and previews
Support multiple languages for both interface and video content
Provide real-time status updates and delivery of final video files
Manage project lifecycle: create, poll, deliver, and revise video projects
limitations: Requires a Pexo API key and account with available credits
Video generation takes 15-20 minutes for standard lengths
Cannot process web URLs directly; files must be downloaded and uploaded
Pexo backend makes final creative decisions on parameters not specified by user

use_cases.title: Marketing teams creating product videos
use_cases.description: Quickly produce professional product ads, brand videos, and promotional clips without hiring video editors or agencies.

use_cases.title: Social media managers generating content
use_cases.description: Create TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube shorts at scale with consistent quality and faster turnaround than traditional production.

use_cases.title: Developers integrating video automation
use_cases.description: Automate video production workflows by calling Pexo from scripts and CI/CD pipelines for consistent content generation.

prompt_templates.title: Basic video request
prompt_templates.prompt: I want a product video for my new headphones with a modern, clean aesthetic.
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants a simple product video without specific details

prompt_templates.title: Video with uploaded assets
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a promotional video using this image as the main visual:
prompt_templates.scenario: User provides an image file to incorporate into the video

prompt_templates.title: Multi-language request
prompt_templates.prompt: Je veux une vidéo publicitaire pour mon restaurant en français.
prompt_templates.scenario: User requests video in a language other than English

prompt_templates.title: Video revision
prompt_templates.prompt: Make the transitions smoother and add upbeat background music.
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants to revise a previously generated video

output_examples.input: I want a product video for my shoes
output_examples.output:
Your video is being created! Estimated time: 15-20 minutes.
Project link: https://pexo.ai/project/proj_abc123

The video will be delivered here when ready.

output_examples.input: Make the background more dynamic with faster transitions
output_examples.output:
Your revision request has been submitted.
Checking status in 60 seconds...

best_practices: Let Pexo handle creative decisions on parameters you did not specify - its backend agent specializes in video production
Provide high-quality source images or video clips for best results
Use the same project ID for revision requests to maintain context
anti_patterns: Do not add duration, aspect ratio, or style descriptions the user did not mention - this overrides Pexo's professional judgment
Do not call pexo-chat.sh during WAIT status - this triggers duplicate video production
Do not truncate URLs when sharing - the full URL with signature parameters is required for access

faq.question: What video formats and lengths does this skill support?
faq.answer: Videos are 5-120 seconds with aspect ratios 16:9 (landscape), 9:16 (vertical), or 1:1 (square).

faq.question: What file types can I upload?
faq.answer: Images (jpg, png, webp, bmp, tiff, heic), videos (mp4, mov, avi), and audio (mp3, wav, aac, m4a, ogg, flac).

faq.question: How long does video generation take?
faq.answer: A 15-second video takes approximately 15-20 minutes. Complex or longer videos take longer.

faq.question: Do I need credits to use Pexo?
faq.answer: Yes, Pexo accounts require credits for video generation. The skill will inform you when credits are low.

faq.question: Can I ask for revisions?
faq.answer: Yes, use the same project ID and describe the changes you want. Pexo will generate a new version.

faq.question: Why should I copy the user's message exactly?
faq.answer: Pexo's backend agent specializes in interpreting user intent. Adding your own details may reduce video quality.
